overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with white dreadlocks and tattoos walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character navigates sidewalks beneath elevated highways, crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles, and passes towering buildings covered in digital billboards and Japanese signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon commercial signs

events.description: futuristic silver sedan drives past on the street to the left
character slows down approaching intersection traffic light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and approaching intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic grey sedan driving along the multi-lane road parallel to sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass covering the sidewalk with support pillars
blue neon sign with Japanese characters reading HOTEL mounted on building facade
green neon arrow sign with BREAKFAST text pointing left
tall curved modern building with grid-patterned windows dominating the skyline
tall digital billboard displaying purple-themed advertisement with character image

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, surrounded by towering futuristic buildings adorned with neon signs and digital billboards. The blue neon hotel sign and purple vertical billboard illuminate the scene as futuristic cars drive past on the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps into open intersection crosswalk
waits for black futuristic car to pass before continuing across street
resumes walking across crosswalk after vehicles pass

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk for traffic to clear then crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating between passing futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sports car driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian in bright pink pants crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall black traffic signal post with red light illuminated
modern curved building with reflective dark glass windows
tall digital screen kiosk displaying advertisements on the sidewalk corner
massive horizontal digital screen with pink and white striped pattern

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection, waiting for a black futuristic car to pass before crossing. The curved glass building looms on the left while a digital advertising kiosk stands on the right sidewalk, and other pedestrians cross in different directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with closed storefronts and digital advertisements

events.description: character briefly passes behind a street sign or pillar, partially obscuring view
blue sports car speeds past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down sidewalk beneath overpass on opposite side of street, passing digital advertisement kiosks and parked vehicles

entered.detail: metal roll-down security shutter of closed shop with corrugated texture
row of parked futuristic cars including a black sedan along the curb
vertical digital kiosk displaying advertisement with human face and green border

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk beneath the same elevated highway, passing closed storefronts with metal shutters and digital advertising kiosks. Parked futuristic vehicles line the curb to the left while the large pink digital screen remains visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a sheltered underpass into a wide intersection and back into a covered walkway. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, where blue and purple neon signs from towering buildings cast a glow over the adjacent multi-lane road. As the character emerges from under the overpass, the scene opens into a broad intersection featuring a curved glass building and digital kiosks, pausing briefly for a black futuristic car to pass. The camera then follows the character across the street and back beneath the shadow of the highway, shifting the focus toward closed storefronts with metal shutters and parked vehicles. Finally, the movement continues along the opposite sidewalk, heading toward a large pink digital screen visible in the distance.
